description: Pins the single GET for a valid tier+version. tier/version validation text diverges (Go: 'tier is required'/'version is required' plus a standard|enterprise check; Python: 'tier must be a non-empty string without ...'), so rejection cases are reported, not pinned.

cases.name: rejects an invalid tier (proto LKETier enum)
cases.expect_error: tier must be one of: standard, enterprise
